title: Create merge-loop-check.sh for workers 9-15
description: Script that for each worker in 9-15: checks out workerN-batch, runs git log --oneline origin/wip/checkpoint-20260715..HEAD to find new commits since checkpoint, associates any new beads found, if new commits then cherry-pick range to main, update associated beads with merge info. Make script idempotent and loopable.
